hero.subtext: Taree's locally owned workshop. Honest quotes, quality work, and a phone call when your car is ready — not a generic text. No upselling. No surprises.

whyUs.heading: The Taree Mechanic That Does It Right
whyUs.subtext: We built this workshop on one principle: do the job properly and treat people with respect.

points.title: Family Owned & Operated
points.desc: We're not a franchise. We're a local Taree family business. When you deal with us, you deal with the people who actually work on your car.

points.title: Straight Talk, No Surprises
points.desc: We tell you what's wrong, what it'll cost, and what can wait. No inflated job sheets. No pressure. Just honest advice from people who know cars.

points.title: Latest Diagnostic Equipment
points.desc: Modern cars need modern tools. Our diagnostic equipment reads the same data as the dealer — without the dealer price tag.

points.title: Warranty-Safe Logbook Servicing
points.desc: We service to manufacturer specifications and stamp your logbook — so your new car warranty stays exactly where it should be.

howItWorks.heading: Getting Your Car Fixed Is Simple
howItWorks.subtext: No stress, no confusion, no hidden extras. Three steps and you're done.

steps.title: Book Your Service
steps.desc: Book online, call us on (02) 6552 6131, or send a message — whatever suits you. We'll confirm a time that fits your schedule.

steps.title: Drop It Off
steps.desc: Bring your car to 16 Albert Lane, Taree. We'll assess it, call you with a clear quote before we start — no surprises.

steps.title: Pick It Up Fixed
steps.desc: We'll call you when it's done. Your car is fixed properly, you know exactly what was done and why, and you're back on the road.

testimonials.heading: Real People. Real Reviews.
testimonials.subtext: Don't take our word for it — here's what Taree locals say about us.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Finally a mechanic that just tells you straight. Brought my Corolla in for a service and they called before doing anything extra. Honest quote, no drama. Back on the road the same day.

reviews.name: Dave R.
reviews.text: Had an urgent brake issue and they fit me in first thing. Fixed properly, price was fair, and they explained exactly what was wrong. Couldn't ask for more from a local workshop.

reviews.name: Michelle T.
reviews.text: Used to dread taking my car to the mechanic — always felt like I was being taken advantage of. Not here. They showed me exactly what needed doing and what could wait. Trust is everything.

reviews.name: Tom K.
reviews.text: Got a pink slip done quickly and they spotted a few other things that were getting close to needing attention. Warned me without pressuring me. That's the kind of place I keep coming back to.

reviews.name: Karen B.
reviews.text: Logbook service was done exactly to the manufacturer specs. They stamped my logbook, showed me the items they checked, and the price matched what they quoted. Simple as that.

reviews.name: James L.
reviews.text: Air con wasn't keeping up in summer. Dropped it off, they found a small leak, repaired and regassed it same day. Ice cold now. Brilliant service, will absolutely be back.
